title: Notes
text: This is where I may post notes, reflections, and small personal observations. Cooking recipes will be updated as well.

title: About
text:
I am a PhD student in Polymer Science and Engineering at UMass Amherst.
This page will include more about my background, research interests, and academic journey.

title: Xinyu Luo
text:
I am a PhD student in Polymer Science and Engineering at UMass Amherst, working in Steve Granick’s research group.
This is my personal academic website and a small personal corner online.
